source: engine-emitted by lib.arm.build_arm_schedule on 2026-04-30; LM-3 teaser-ARM fixture; documents D-02 lifetime-ceiling computed against note_rate (industry/Fannie convention) — alternative CFPB §1951 against loan.annual_rate is explicitly NOT used per D-02 lock
notes: Teaser ARM. loan.annual_rate=0.03 (teaser), note_rate=0.05 (post-teaser base). Lifetime ceiling = note_rate(0.05)+0.05 = 0.10 (engine choice per D-02 LM-3), NOT loan.annual_rate-based 0.08. fully_indexed=0.175 -> ceiling=0.10 -> new_rate=0.10. applied_cap='lifetime'. Pins LM-3 convention against silent regression.
